creator: tatsuki_makino@hotmail.com
text:
(In reply to tesu from comment #15)

When configuring /etc/rc.conf to load the kernel modules, it seems to use a method that is affected by the result of "sysctl kern.module_path".
The result of this seems to give /boot/kernel the highest priority, so it seems that /boot/modules/radeonkms.ko must be specified as an absolute full path.

I don't know about firefox :)
It seems that the list of installed packages only has a tiled window manager, so it would tend to be drawn that way.
Even in my environment, windows that do not start redrawing sometimes occur when HDD is running hard.
